name: Board International BI & CPM API
what_it_does: Board International REST API for integrated business intelligence, corporate performance management (CPM), and financial planning and analysis (FP&A). Enables AI agents to manage financial planning and budgeting workflow for FP&A automation, handle management reporting and dashboard creation for executive analytics, access profitability analysis and cost allocation for management accounting automation, retrieve sales performance and pipeline analytics for revenue operations, manage workforce planning and headcount budgeting for HR finance automation, handle supply chain planning integration for operational planning, access scenario modeling and what-if analysis for strategic planning automation, retrieve KPI monitoring and variance analysis for business performance reporting, manage consolidation and intercompany elimination for group financial reporting, and integrate Board with ERP (SAP, Oracle), CRM, and HR systems for unified planning data.
use_cases: Automating financial budgeting from FP&A agents
Building management dashboards from BI analytics agents
Running scenario analysis from strategic planning agents
Consolidating financial data from group reporting agents
not_for: Simple departmental reporting without enterprise planning needs
Organizations without dedicated FP&A or BI teams
Very small companies without corporate performance management complexity
best_when: A mid-to-large enterprise using Board International wants AI agents to automate financial planning, budgeting, management reporting, and corporate performance management workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL REPORTING ACCURACY RISK: Automated financial consolidation and intercompany elimination in Board must maintain audit trail and review gates; automated adjustments to management accounts without CFO or controller review create financial reporting inaccuracy risk and Sarbanes-Oxley internal control concerns. Planning assumption governance — automated budget and forecast updates must preserve human review for strategic assumptions; automated planning adjustments that change business unit budgets without management approval undermine governance. SOX Section 302/906 compliance — automated financial reporting workflows touching public company financial statements require SOX controls and management sign-off; fully automated financial close without human review violates SOX control objectives.

auth.notes: Board International uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Chiasso, Switzerland HQ (offices in Boston, London, Milan). Founded 1994 by Giovanni Grossi. Private (Grafton Capital, NB Renaissance). 3,000+ customers. Unified BI + CPM + planning platform (HBMP architecture). Competes with Anaplan, OneStream, and Workday Adaptive for enterprise CPM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user and per-module pricing
pricing.notes: Chiasso, Switzerland. Founded 1994. Grafton Capital/NB Renaissance-backed. 3,000+ customers. Unified BI and CPM planning. Competes with Anaplan and OneStream for enterprise planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: SOX INTERNAL CONTROL RISK: Automated financial planning and consolidation for public company reporting must maintain SOX-compliant audit trail and management review gates; automated financial adjustments without controller review undermine Section 302/906 certification

Budget governance — automated budget updates that change business unit targets without management approval undermine planning governance; implement approval workflow gates before automated budget adjustments are committed

HBMP architecture complexity — Board uses a proprietary Hybrid Bitonic Memory Pattern (HBMP) data structure; API access to Board cubes requires understanding of Board's dimensional data model, which differs from standard relational or OLAP structures
No webhooks — planning event and data refresh notification requires polling; no native push for planning cycle completion or KPI threshold alerts

On-premises vs cloud divergence — Board is available both on-premises and cloud; API capabilities and deployment requirements differ between deployment models; verify cloud vs on-premises API documentation
European HQ and GDPR — Board HQ in Switzerland with EU operations; GDPR data processing agreements required for EU employee and customer data in planning models
agent_readiness.security_notes: CPM and BI. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Financial planning and management reporting data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Financial and management data.
